content.full_text:
DANIEL E. LUNGREN
Attorney General

State of California
DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE

1515 K STREET, SUITE 511
P.O. BOX 944255
SACRAMENTO 94244-2550

March 27, 1991

Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804

CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM:

Andrew K. Rauch
1731 Howe Avenue, Suite 548
Sacramento, CA 95825

We are forwarding the enclosed letter for whatever action you
deem appropriate. Please contact this office if we can be of
assistance to you. You may reach us at (916) 324-5765.

The correspondent has been informed of our action.

Sincerely,

Robert M. Raymer
ROBERT M. RAYMER, Analyst
Public Inquiry Unit

RMR:cpc

Enclosure

LAW OFFICES OF
ANDREW K. RAUCH
1731 HOWE AVE. SUITE 548
SACRAMENTO, CA 95825
(916) 553-2157

MAR 1 8 1991

March 12, 1991

Office of the Attorney General
Attn: Elections Unit
1515 K Street, Suite 511
P.O. Box 944255
Sacramento, CA 94244-2550

Dear Attorney General:

I am conducting research on the enforcement of campaign and
election law. Please inform me whether your agency is responsible
for the enforcement of Election Code Sections 29101-29102; 29200-
29200.5; 29300-29303; and 29700-29734.

If not, would you please inform me which agency is? If your
agency does enforce these provisions of the Election Code, please
tell me:

1. Is there a specific individual or unit responsible in
your agency for this area? If so, please identify him/her or them.

2. Do you maintain files regarding complaints received
regarding possible violations of these statutes? If so, are they
available for public inspection?

3. Do you keep statistics regarding complaints about poten-
tial violations of these statutes? If so, are they available for
public review?

4. How many cases has your agency prosecuted in the last
10 years?

5. How many convictions has your agency obtained during this
period? Where are these records maintained?

Thank you for your help in providing responses to my ques-
tions. If you have any questions regarding my request, please
do not hesitate to contact me at the above address.

Kindest regards,

Andrew K. Rauch

[illegible]
[illegible]
